title: prosaptia bolobensis
intro: Prosaptia bolobensis is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, particularly in Papua New Guinea. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The leaves of the Prosaptia bolobensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or made into a paste for external application, offering potential health benefits such as wound healing and relief from skin irritations.
